# SquarePic — Free Online Image Editor
# https://squarepic-next.vercel.app

## About
SquarePic is a free online image editor that lets you resize, crop, compress, and convert images. All processing happens locally in your browser — no uploads, no watermarks, no signup required.

## Tools
- Square Image Editor: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/edit
- Image Compressor: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/compressor
- Image Converter: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/converter
- Photo Cropper: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/cropper

## Platform Size Guides
- Instagram Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/instagram
- Facebook Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/facebook
- X (Twitter) Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/x-twitter
- LinkedIn Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/linkedin
- TikTok Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/tiktok
- YouTube Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/youtube
- Pinterest Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/pinterest
- Snapchat Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/snapchat
- WhatsApp Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/whatsapp
- Twitch Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/twitch
- Reddit Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/reddit
- Telegram Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/telegram
- Discord Image Sizes: https://squarepic-next.vercel.app/resize/discord

## Features
- All processing is client-side (HTML5 Canvas) — images never leave your device
- Export formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP, BMP, GIF, ICO, AVIF, TIFF
- Batch compress with slider or target-size mode
- Batch convert between 8 image formats
- Interactive crop with 8 drag handles and aspect ratio presets
